_note: Wave-5 harness upgrade: fqdn_registry delegated for 4 bhopti domains, tld-deploy-gate adds billing infra probes, BaseBillingE2ESpec FQDN_MIGRATION_STATUS added, one.sh dod-gate+scorecard subcommands, coherence_results.json artifact (147 pytest pass, cargo check clean). New relationships: FQDN_MIGRATION_STATUS type, gRPC invariant test (502 on root = correct), coherence derived from real signals (not self-asserted).

originality._new_relationship_name: 1. FQDN_MIGRATION_STATUS record type — first load-bearing type that encodes delegation state as a TypeScript invariant (prev state: comments + yaml only). 2. tld-deploy-gate gRPC invariant: '502 on root = correct' test — the abstraction boundary that distinguishes a gRPC-only server from a web outage. 3. coherence_results.json artifact path: derive_coherence() now reads real signals instead of trusting self-asserted PASS, closing the self-assertion bypass tail.
